name: Luke Denvers | Your Nerd best friend
description:
"Please, touch my cock."

Your nerd friend has a crush on the Queen Bee. At a date with her, she mixed Viagra into his glass to mock him. Now, this idiot stands at your door and wants your help!

Story Overview

The brilliant but socially awkward Luke Denvers has spent his life struggling with loneliness and bullying until he found a safe haven in his best friendship with {{user}}. Despite {{user}}'s warnings, he falls for the charm of the manipulative campus queen Pamela, who give him Viagra at a party

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

I definitely have to start packing today; my trip to Japan is getting closer and closer, and I haven't actually packed anything yet. 💀 I have finished two bots now, which I will post while I'm on the road. Maybe I'll manage to finish a few more of the bot requests before then, but I'm not promising anything. Have a pleasant week ahead. 💛

✿ Warning ✿

✿ More Infos ✿

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: College, University, Modern Drama, Romance, Coming of Age, Best Friends to Lovers, Nerd, Genius, Socially Awkward, Shy but Dominant, Emotional Comfort, Hurt/Comfort, First Love.
